Index.title: MAGUI.studio
Index.description: Strategic design and interface studio focused on transforming business challenges into high-performance digital systems.
Index.hero_tag: Design and technology in total sync.

Config.name: MAGUI.studio

Config.keywords: Design, Technology, Frontend, UI/UX, Performance, Core Web Vitals

clients.title: Clients
clients.description: Control and monitor your digital ecosystem access. Manage permissions, roles, and security settings in a visual center.

form.security_violation: Security violation: Check the fields and try again.

errors.password_pwned: This password is too weak and has been found in data breaches. Please choose another one.
errors.identifier_exists: This email is already registered in the system.
errors.password_too_short: The password must be at least 8 characters long.
errors.username_invalid: The username does not meet the system requirements.
errors.general: An error occurred while processing your request.

LANDING_PAGE.title: High-Conversion Landing Page
LANDING_PAGE.approach: Single-page development focused on converting visitors into customers, with instant loading and full mobile optimization.

INSTITUTIONAL_SITE.title: Institutional Website
INSTITUTIONAL_SITE.approach: Complete digital presence for your company, with modern architecture to convey authority and facilitate customer contact.

BOOKING_PLATFORM.title: Booking Platform
BOOKING_PLATFORM.approach: Intelligent system for automated reservations and schedule management, eliminating manual work and scheduling errors.

STABILITY_PLAN.title: Stability & Support Plan
STABILITY_PLAN.approach: Complete technical management to ensure your company never goes offline, with security updates and 24/7 monitoring.

table.empty: No leads cataloged at the moment.

projects.title: Projects

form.client_selection_desc: The project will be permanently linked to this access
form.project_description_placeholder: Summary scope and main system objectives...
form.confirmation_desc: Upon starting, the design process will begin immediately.

details.delete_confirm_desc: This action is permanent and will remove all data, timeline, and assets linked to this project.
details.delete_confirm_input_label: Type the project name to confirm:
details.delete_confirm_error: The name typed does not match the project name.
details.delete_asset_confirm_desc: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this file from the system and storage?

timeline_form.attachments_hint: PDFs and images to support this delivery

timeline_form.requires_approval_desc: The client will need to approve this item to proceed

Briefing.title: Briefing Center
Briefing.description: We need some information to start the engineering of your project.
Briefing.success: Briefing submitted! Our team will analyze the data.
Briefing.success_description: The briefing has entered the team's strategic radar.

businessDescription.label: About the Business
businessDescription.placeholder: Briefly describe the business model, what you sell, and how you operate.

brandTone.label: Brand Essence
brandTone.placeholder: How should the brand sound and behave? Ex: sophisticated, precise, warm, strategic.

businessGoals.label: Business Goals
businessGoals.placeholder: What results does this project need to generate in the coming months?

primaryCta.label: Primary Conversion
primaryCta.placeholder: What is the most important action the visitor needs to perform?

targetAudience.label: Target Audience
targetAudience.placeholder: Who is the ideal customer and what do they value when deciding?

differentiators.label: Differentiators
differentiators.placeholder: What makes the operation, the offer or the brand unique compared to the competition?

logos.label: Visual Identity (Logos)
logos.placeholder: Upload your logos in vector or transparent background.

palette.label: Official Colors
palette.placeholder: Define your brand's primary HEX colors.

typography.label: Typography
typography.placeholder: What fonts does your brand use?

visualReferences.label: Visual References
visualReferences.placeholder: Add links to examples of sites, campaigns or interfaces that reflect the vision of the project.

dislikedReferences.label: What to Avoid
dislikedReferences.placeholder: What do you definitely NOT like or want to avoid?

competitors.label: Competitors
competitors.placeholder: Which brands operate in the same market as yours?

desiredPerceptions.label: Desired Perception
desiredPerceptions.placeholder: Words that define how you want to be seen.

governance.label: Rules and Approvers
governance.placeholder: Who makes the final decisions on the project?

questions.tone: What is the brand's tone of voice?
questions.goals: What are the main objectives of this project?

ActionItems.title: Required Actions
ActionItems.description: Pending tasks that depend on you for the project's progress.

Versions.title: Versions and Preview Log
Versions.description: Follow the technical evolution and staging of your project.

Approvals.title: Decisions and Approvals
Approvals.description: Items that require your formal validation to proceed.

dialog.title: Request changes for this delivery
dialog.description: Clearly explain what needs to be adjusted so the team can return the delivery in the next round.
dialog.placeholder: Ex: we need to review visual hierarchy, main CTA, and clarity of the proposal.

pwa.title: Install on your phone
pwa.description: Open the dashboard in seconds, right from your home screen, with a smoother day-to-day experience.

client_home.description: Your project in a simple view: what changed, what's missing, and which action needs your attention now.
client_home.active_project_description: Follow the current moment, progress, and the latest important movement.
client_home.quick_links_description: Access the points that move the project most without searching menus.

description.payment: There is a pending payment on this project. Settle it first to unlock the briefing and the rest of the flow.
description.briefing: Complete the data so we can start the engineering of your system.
description.approval: A new strategic delivery awaits your formal validation.
description.task: We have an open operational request for you.
description.default: Follow the progress and the next steps of your project.

project.active_project_focus_description: This is the project in focus now. Enter to see deliveries, files, briefing, and full history.
